nl_query: Which parent questions have exactly three sub-questions?
failed_sql:
SELECT q.id, q.code, q.path, q.max_marks
FROM   question q
JOIN   question_section qs ON q.id = qs.parent_question_id
GROUP BY q.id
HAVING COUNT(qs.id) = 3;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'qs.parent_question_id' does not exist. The Postgres planner suggests 'q.parent_question_id' — use that, or verify the column belongs to the qualifying table in your FROM/JOIN clauses.
